title: Explosive Bow
body:
## Overview

A simple, lightweight plugin that adds customisable explosive **bows** and **crossbows** - you can enable/disable the items & edit their power in the `config.yml`!

## What does it do?

The plugin adds a [crafting recipe](https://modrinth.com/plugin/explosive-bow/gallery) for a bow and a crossbow, which shoot explosive arrows (by default, the crossbow only works with rocket to not make it too overpowered), which can be changed in the `config.yml` (not added yet in ALPHA)

## How do I customise it?

By default, this plugin should create a folder in `/plugins`, called `ExplosiveBow`, where the config is located!
